features: „ÄêSupplement„ÄëAfter your scent blocks are used up, you can purchase refill packs separately. The refill packs are available in two scents: Coconut (ASIN: B0GFTLFVTD) and Amber (ASIN: B0GFT9V28Y), (Refill packs do not include the sun visor clip)

„ÄêInnovative Sun Visor Design„Äë Clever clip-on structure that attaches directly to the sun visor ‚Äì no obstruction to air vents or cup holders. Keeps your dashboard organized, maintains clear visibility, and uses space efficiently for a comfortable driving environment.

„ÄêCabana (Coconut) Scent„Äë A tropical-inspired, soft fragrance that combines floral brightness with creamy coconut, enhanced by notes of vanilla and sandalwood. Creates a soothing, vacation-like mood inside your car for a relaxing ride.

„ÄêAmber Scent„ÄëA warm and elegant fragrance blending amber and floral tones with a touch of lavender and vanilla. Musk and sandalwood form a refined base, leaving a sensual, long-lasting impression.

„ÄêPremium Plaster Diffuser„ÄëCrafted from a refined mineral-blend material that absorbs and releases fragrance evenly. Each stone undergoes deep infusion with essential oils for long-lasting diffusion and a natural aroma that lingers for weeks.

„ÄêMagnetic Design ‚Äì Stable & Reliable„ÄëSimply attach the metal holder to the sun visor (facing downward). The back of each plaster fragrance stone features a magnetic surface that securely adheres to the clip ‚Äî no slipping, no shaking, always stylish and safe.
„ÄêPure & Safe Formula„ÄëFree from harsh chemicals or artificial additives. Made with natural essential oils, vegan, cruelty-free, and non-GMO ‚Äì safe for humans, pets, and the environment.
„ÄêPackaging List„ÄëIncludes one Cabana (Coconut) scented plaster stone, one Amber scented plaster stone, and one metal clip for sun visor attachment.
